Lisbon, 2026

The Serenia Collection

The Serenia collection began as a private ritual. A way back to the body when the world got too loud.

Each painting is oil pastel on handmade cotton paper, worked slowly by hand until the texture tells you something words don't. Small in size. Particular in feeling. There is only one of each.

The Artist

I make these because I needed them first. If you find yourself drawn to one, it is probably for the same reason.

Each painting is oil pastel on handmade cotton paper, worked slowly by hand. The texture is part of it — creamy, built up in layers, made by hand. These are objects you live with, not look at once.

Every piece isan original.
